nodes.context: Camorra clan based in Afragola, operating in lower Lazio and Caserta, involved in construction, drug trafficking, and control of shopping centers.
Powerful Camorra clan from Casal di Principe, involved in drug trafficking and construction.
Camorra clan from Sessa Aurunca, allied with the Magliulo clan.
Camorra clan from Afragola, rival of the Magliulo clan in a bloody feud over construction contracts.
Camorra clan from Torre del Greco, from which a splinter faction led by Gaetano Magliulo broke off.

edges.context: The Magliulo clan had very close ties with the Casalesi clan; Mario Magliulo was a co-founder with Antonio Bardellino and was Bardellino's brother-in-law.
The Magliulo clan had direct contacts with the Esposito clan of Sessa Aurunca.
The Magliulo and Moccia clans were involved in a bloody feud over construction contracts for the Rione Salicelle.
Gaetano Magliulo, head of the Camorra faction in Torre del Greco, was also the leader of a splinter faction of the Falanga clan.
